lobbying.name: Political Lobbying
lobbying.description: Rally political support for the programme.
lobbying.flavourText: The corridors of power must be navigated carefully.

emergencyProcurement.name: Emergency Procurement
emergencyProcurement.flavourText: No time for the usual channels.

publicAppeal.name: Public Outreach
publicAppeal.description: Broadcast the mission to the public.
publicAppeal.flavourText: The people deserve to know what is at stake.

academicConference.name: Academic Conference
academicConference.flavourText: The best minds of a generation, gathered.

voxPopuli.name: Voice of the People
voxPopuli.description: A series of public polls to survey public opinion.
voxPopuli.flavourText: The people’s voice is a powerful force in politics.

jungleExpedition.name: Jungle Expedition
jungleExpedition.description: Send a team to remote locations to explore exotic flora and fauna
jungleExpedition.flavourText: There is still so much life on Earth to be discovered.

peerReview.name: Peer Review
peerReview.description: Independent validation of research findings accelerates credibility.

industrialContracts.name: Industrial Contracts
industrialContracts.description: Secure long-term supply agreements with manufacturing partners.

mediaBlitz.name: Media Blitz
mediaBlitz.description: Launch a coordinated public communications campaign.
mediaBlitz.flavourText: The narrative must be controlled before it controls us.

orbitDeploy.name: Orbital Deployment
orbitDeploy.description: Fast-track a satellite to low Earth orbit.
orbitDeploy.flavourText: The higher the vantage, the further the reach.

signalFilter.name: Noise Filtering Algorithm
signalFilter.description: Advanced computational filtering strips cosmic background from the signal.

softwareGrant.name: Software Development Grant
softwareGrant.description: Fund a dedicated software research initiative.
softwareGrant.flavourText: Code is the new slide rule.

globalBroadcast.name: Global Broadcast
globalBroadcast.description: Transmit programme achievements via satellite to a worldwide audience.
globalBroadcast.flavourText: Every nation watches. Every parliament takes note.

computerModellingRun.name: Computer Modelling Run
computerModellingRun.description: Run a large-scale simulation to accelerate theoretical research.
computerModellingRun.flavourText: The machine works while the team sleeps.

digitalCoordination.name: Digital Coordination Network
digitalCoordination.description: Link research teams across facilities via digital networks.
digitalCoordination.flavourText: Shared data multiplies faster than any single laboratory could.

biomedicalAdvance.name: Biomedical Advance
biomedicalAdvance.description: Apply sequencing breakthroughs to programme health and longevity research.
biomedicalAdvance.flavourText: Keeping our people operational is also an engineering problem.

openSourceResearch.name: Open-Source Research Platform
openSourceResearch.description: Release non-classified findings to accelerate global scientific progress.
openSourceResearch.flavourText: The signal affects everyone. The response should too.

signalDeconvolution.name: Signal Deconvolution Run
signalDeconvolution.description: Apply digital telemetry techniques to isolate signal from background noise.
signalDeconvolution.flavourText: The pattern was always there. We simply lacked the tools to see it.

backChannelNegotiation.name: Back-Channel Negotiation
backChannelNegotiation.description: Quiet diplomacy to resolve a supply dispute through unofficial channels.
backChannelNegotiation.flavourText: Some agreements are best left unwritten.

emergencyAppeal.name: Emergency Appeal
emergencyAppeal.description: Spend 20 Political Will to secure 30 emergency Funding.
emergencyAppeal.flavourText: The mandate of the mission is its own currency.

emergencySourcing.name: Emergency Sourcing
emergencySourcing.description: Spend 25 Political Will to acquire 20 Materials through emergency channels.
emergencySourcing.flavourText: Supply chains bend when enough pressure is applied.

executiveOverride.name: Executive Override
executiveOverride.description: Spend 30 Political Will to authorise one additional action next turn.
executiveOverride.flavourText: Some decisions cannot wait for consensus.
